idea_text: A marketplace matching longevity clinics with patients seeking peptide and hormone therapy, with verified provider credentials.
title: Longevity clinic marketplace

market_research.summary: Growing consumer demand for longevity and hormone optimization, fragmented supply of vetted clinics.
demand_signals: Rising search interest in peptides and TRT
Clinic ad spend on patient acquisition
open_questions: What is real willingness-to-pay per lead?
market_research.tam_hypothesis: US wellness/longevity spend in the tens of billions; serviceable lead-gen slice in the low hundreds of millions.

competitors.name: Established telehealth platforms
competitors.notes: Own the patient relationship but not longevity-specialized.

competitors.positioning_gap: No trusted, credential-verified marketplace specialized in longevity therapies.

pricing.rationale: Marketplace take-rate on leads plus recurring clinic SaaS for stickiness.

offer.headline: Get matched with a verified longevity clinic in minutes.

positioning.one_liner: The trusted marketplace for longevity care.
positioning.because: every clinic is credential-verified and longevity-specialized

mvp.goal: Prove patients will submit qualified intake and clinics will pay for leads.

success_metric.name: paid_leads
success_metric.description: Clinics paying for routed qualified leads

endpoints.purpose: Route a qualified lead to a clinic

agents.purpose: Verify clinic credentials and market data
Draft clinic outreach and patient comms

hooks: The longevity clinic checklist nobody gives you
Is your TRT clinic actually legit?

seo.notes: High-intent, health-sensitive keywords; ensure compliant, non-claim language.

risks.mitigation: Legal review; restrict to compliant states; no medical advice; clinician sign-off.
Seed clinics first; concentrate one metro.

recommendation.rationale: Real demand and a clear trust gap, but compliance risk is high — validate legality and lead economics before building.
recommendation.next_step: Approve to proceed, or request changes. No building begins until you approve.

explanation: Full workup complete. Strong opportunity with a trust-and-verification wedge; gated on compliance and lead-economics validation. Awaiting your approval before any build begins.
